nodes.label: Known limitations to disclose (optional, but honest)
nodes.norm_label: known limitations to disclose (optional, but honest)

nodes.label: JSZip (zip extraction for embedded images/drawing anchors)
nodes.norm_label: jszip (zip extraction for embedded images/drawing anchors)

nodes.label: Preview Proxy (/api/proxy)
nodes.rationale: CORS-bypassing in-memory fetch on Vercel: file streams through, never written to disk, so free Trello plans (10 MB) and paid plans (up to 25 MB) can both preview without server storage.

nodes.label: Client-side Formula Calculation
nodes.rationale: xlsx-calc is lazy-loaded only when the workbook has formula cells without cached values; files saved by Excel/LibreOffice (vast majority) skip the load entirely. Unsupported formulas fall back to showing the formula text (fillFormulaStubs kept as safety net).

nodes.label: Theme-palette Color Resolution
nodes.rationale: Excel's default color picker writes theme=+tint= refs, not rgb=; fills/font colors are resolved against xl/theme/theme1.xml with the ECMA tint formula. Untinted theme-0/1 (sheet default text/background) deliberately stay unresolved so dark mode keeps control. Indexed legacy colors remain unresolved (no real file hit them yet).

nodes.label: cp1251 Encoding Fix for Old .xls
nodes.rationale: BIFF files saved without a CODEPAGE record decoded as cp1252 and showed mojibake for Cyrillic; a dense U+00C0-U+00FF character signature is detected and the file is re-read as cp1251.

nodes.label: Embedded Image Positioning (monotonic grid edges)
nodes.rationale: twoCellAnchor images are sized from monotonic column/row edges of the laid-out grid (merged cells can't produce negative sizes), then refined to the picture's own a:xfrm/a:ext size and shrunk (never grown) to the anchor box so they can't spill onto text rows. Logos anchored in trimmed empty top rows render in a reserved header band.

nodes.label: WMF Labelled Placeholder Decision
nodes.rationale: Browsers can't decode legacy WMF vector clip-art. In-browser WMF-to-canvas conversion (js-wmf) was evaluated on 46 real files and rejected - half blank, half unusable black silhouettes - so WMF blips render as a same-size labelled placeholder instead of silently disappearing.

nodes.label: Authorization Capabilities (guideline #9)
nodes.rationale: authorization-status, show-authorization, show-settings and on-enable capabilities are required by Trello Marketplace guideline #9 for a Power-Up that authorizes the user for Rename/Delete.

nodes.label: SSRF Allowlist (Trello + AWS S3, HTTPS only)
nodes.norm_label: ssrf allowlist (trello + aws s3, https only)

nodes.label: e2e GitHub Actions Workflow (playwright job)
nodes.rationale: Runs on PRs to main plus a nightly cron at 03:17 UTC to catch Trello/SheetJS-side breakage without an active PR; the off-peak time keeps Trello rate-limit headroom.

nodes.label: Playwright E2E Suite
nodes.rationale: Tests run only against a dedicated private test Trello board; synthetic fixtures are generated (generate-fixtures) and seeded as card attachments (seed-board) before runs.

nodes.label: storageState.json Trello Session
nodes.rationale: Playwright login cookies saved by npm run auth; in CI restored from base64 secret TRELLO_STORAGE_STATE_B64. Trello cookies expire in ~30 days, so the secret must be regenerated periodically. The auth script also stores TRELLO_USER_TOKEN in member-private pluginData so Preview tests don't hang on an authorize() popup.

nodes.label: RELEASE.md Known Limitations (public roadmap)
nodes.source_location: ## Known limitations to keep on the public roadmap

nodes.label: Privacy Policy (EN + UA)
nodes.author: Oleksandr Onufrienko
nodes.rationale: Privacy-by-design position: no analytics/trackers/cookies, no user database; attachment passes through the proxy in memory only; short-lived Trello token lives only in Trello's card-private storage; parsing happens entirely in the browser.

nodes.label: Terms of Use (EN + UA)
nodes.author: Oleksandr Onufrienko
nodes.rationale: As-is/no-warranty license with $100 liability cap, governed by Ukrainian law; explicitly forbids abusing the proxy service or its rate limits.

nodes.label: TODO Exploratory Follow-ups
nodes.rationale: Non-blocking experiments; each item becomes its own branch when picked up.

nodes.label: Cell Styles Fix Root Cause (applyCellStyles selector)
nodes.rationale: The bug was never OOXML parsing (parseStyles was correct, 204 styled cells proven in Node) but the DOM selector in applyCellStyles: td[data-r] never exists, and sheet_to_html's id option makes cell ids 'excel-table-A1' not 'sjs-A1'. Final fix reads the cell address as the suffix after the last '-' (addresses never contain '-'), prefix-agnostic. Also honors explicit-false boolean font props (<b val="0"/>) emitted by LibreOffice.
nodes.norm_label: cell styles fix root cause (applycellstyles selector)

nodes.label: Image Positioning Fix (buildGridEdges + header band)
nodes.rationale: positionImages sized twoCellAnchor images from DOM rect differences; with merged cells the 'to' cell can land visually above 'from', producing negative height that a size guard silently dropped (all 7 images of a real price-list). Fix: buildGridEdges() computes monotonic cumulative colEdges/rowEdges like Excel does (never negative); negative from-indices clamp to 0; logos in trimmed empty top rows get a reserved header band via wrapper paddingTop.

nodes.label: Images v2 (a:xfrm ext sizing, rotation, groups, WMF)
nodes.source_location: ## Other image files still misaligned on preview
nodes.rationale: Four root causes fixed in the shared algorithm: (1) size taken from the pic's own a:xfrm/a:ext EMU then shrunk-never-grown to the anchor box because our column widths differ from Excel's and most real anchors are editAs=oneCell; (2) a:xfrm rot (1/60000 deg) + flipH/flipV applied as CSS transforms; (3) grpSp groups render every pic in its own sub-box via chOff/chExt child space; (4) WMF blips get a labelled placeholder after js-wmf conversion was tested on all 46 real WMFs and rejected (23 blank, 23 black silhouettes). Deliberate remaining limits: oneCellAnchor can still overlap neighbours; charts (graphicFrame) not rendered - separate future feature.
nodes.norm_label: images v2 (a:xfrm ext sizing, rotation, groups, wmf)

nodes.label: UptimeRobot Monitoring on /api/health
nodes.rationale: Pings /api/health every 5 min and emails on downtime. The monitor watches HTTP 200 (+ optional status:ok keyword), not uptimeSeconds, because Vercel cold-starts reset uptimeSeconds to 0.

nodes.label: Charts (graphicFrame) Not Rendered
nodes.rationale: User decided chart rendering is a separate future feature - its own branch when picked up.

nodes.label: CLAUDE.md Behavioral Guidelines
nodes.rationale: Bias toward caution over speed: think before coding, simplicity first, surgical changes, goal-driven execution with verifiable success criteria.
